events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need produce JSON answer. Need assess scenario: unprotected trench ≥5 ft with workers in it, residential job, in-progress. OSHA 1926 Subpart P requires protective systems for trenches 5 ft or deeper unless excavation is made entirely in stable rock. For trenches 20 ft or deeper, protective system designed by registered PE. Sloping/benching, shoring, shielding. Also competent person, access/egress, atmospheric, etc. Immediate hazard: cave-in, engulfment, struck-by, suffocation. Severity critical. Decision fail. Component conditions: non-compliant, installed-defective? The trench protection is absent/defective. Use installed-defective and non-compliant. Work stage in-progress. Percent complete maybe 50? Not important but estimate. Value 0. Confidence 1.0. Findings: trench 5 ft or deeper lacks protective system; workers inside exposed to cave-in; no mention of sloping/shoring/shielding/competent person/egress. Actions: evacuate workers immediately; install protective system (sloping, benching, shoring, trench shield) per Subpart P; designate competent person; inspect soil; provide safe access/egress within 25 ft; barricade; retrain. References: OSHA 1926.650, 1926.651, 1926.652. Need output exactly JSON. Ensure no prose.

    "Ensure a competent person inspects the excavation and protective system before re-entry.",
    "Provide safe means of access/egress within 25 ft of workers.",
    "Barricade the trench perimeter and post warning signage.",
    "Review excavation safety procedures and retrain workers."
  ],
  "rationale": "OSHA 1926 Subpart P requires a protective system for any trench 5 ft or deeper unless the excavation is entirely in stable rock. An unprotected trench with workers inside presents an imminent danger of cave-in, making the work non-compliant and unsafe to continue.",
